items.name: Main Cannon
items.description: Forward nose cannon. Click or hold to fire manually; link a turret via the tech tree for automatic fire.

items.name: Laser Turret
items.description: Mounts a continuous plasma beam turret that fires alongside your main cannon.

items.name: Missile Turret
items.description: Homing missile rack. Fire-and-forget ordnance that tracks the nearest hostile.

items.name: Plasma Turret
items.description: Heavy plasma cannon. Slower fire rate but devastating per shot.

items.name: Beam Laser
items.description: High-intensity beam emitter. Sustained damage on any target held in line.

items.name: Hull Plating
items.description: Reinforced hull plating. Increases maximum hull integrity.

items.name: Composite Armor
items.description: Dense alloy layering reduces all incoming damage.

items.name: Shield Generator
items.description: Electromagnetic shield. Absorbs damage before hull; draws continuous energy.

items.name: Nanobot Array
items.description: Self-replicating nanobots slowly repair hull damage.
